main.summary: A record describing the outcome of an Activity.

constructor.name: Constructor
constructor.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

property.name: Code
property.summary: Gets the that describes the Activity outcome.

property.name: Message
property.summary: Gets an optional diagnostic message associated with the Activity outcome.

property.name: TimeStamp
property.summary: Gets the time when the Activity record was created.

main.summary: Defines values that describe the outcome of an Activity.

field.name: Failed
field.summary: The Activity did not complete successfully.

field.name: Faulted
field.summary: The Activity encountered an error and was faulted.

field.name: None
field.summary: No specific outcome is recorded for the Activity.

field.name: TimedOut
field.summary: The Activity did not complete before the configured timeout elapsed.
